title: Twitter @antoine_chaffin
summary:
Agents go wild with this and have no issue leveraging its effectiveness
We ran 135 questions (variable difficulty) across 7 repos
Answers generated with ColGrep were preferred 70% of the time, while using 15.7% fewer tokens on average and using 56% less search operations

title: Twitter @aaxsh18
summary: @mixedbreadai wow, late interaction is really an interesting paradigm. it helps to combine the best of both world, token level and semantic understanding. while beeing multimodal. mixedbreads offering makes it super easy for developers to give their agents state of the art search
